title: Reference — templates, guides, fleet GitBook mirrors (ecosystem-os local override)
purpose: Provisioning reference home for the fleet-documentation hub. Local override of canon 07-reference extends allowedChildFolders with gitbooks/ (mirrored sibling-repo GitBook sources the hub curates), onboarding/ (fleet onboarding reference), and legacy-layer-root/ (legacy layer-root holding, distinct from legacy-top-level/).
